# AI Rules — nestjs
<!-- Generated by memory-core on 2026-05-10 -->

These rules apply to ALL AI agents in this project.

**Type:** backend | **Language:** Typescript
**Backend:** Clean Architecture


---
## Backend — Clean Architecture
1. Entities encapsulate core business logic and have no external dependencies
2. Use cases orchestrate application workflows and call domain entities
3. Controllers must only validate input and delegate to use cases
4. Infrastructure layer (DB, HTTP, queues) depends on application — never the reverse
5. Domain layer must not import any framework or library code
6. Use DTOs to transfer data across layer boundaries
7. Repository interfaces are defined in the domain/application layer, implemented in infrastructure
8. Validation happens at the interface/controller layer only

**Avoid:**
- Business logic in controllers or route handlers
- Direct database queries inside use cases
- Framework-specific imports in the domain layer
- Calling use cases from other use cases directly
- Fat repositories that contain business logic

---
## Inherited Decisions
0. **[rule]** Use (groupName) folders to organize routes without affecting URLs. Group by concern: (marketing), (dashboard), (auth). Each group can have its own layout.
   _tags: route-groups, structure, nextjs_

2. **[rule]** Use (groupName) folders to organize routes without affecting URLs. Group by concern: (marketing), (dashboard), (auth). Each group can have its own layout.
   _tags: route-groups, structure, nextjs_
3. **[rule]** Domain entities and value objects must not import any framework, ORM, or library. Pure TypeScript/language only.
   _tags: domain, clean-architecture_
4. **[rule]** The core (domain + application) must not import Express, NestJS, Prisma, or any framework. Pure domain logic only.
   _tags: core, framework-free, hexagonal_
5. **[decision]** Use route groups (folder) to organize routes without affecting URLs. Group by feature or access level (auth), (public).
   _tags: route-groups, structure, nextjs_
6. **[rule]** Use cases must not import Prisma, TypeORM, or any ORM entity. Call repository interfaces only.
   _tags: use-case, orm, clean-architecture_
7. **[rule]** The application core (domain + use cases) must not import Express, NestJS, Fastify, Prisma, TypeORM, or any framework library. Pure language code only.
   _tags: core, framework-free, hexagonal_
